meaning: v.夸大...的重要性,表演过火,打(或踢)得比...好
examples: The United States has to be careful it doesn't overplay its hand.
But did he overplay his hand?
The same thing could happen to the survivors if they overplay their hands.
As the new DG, Azevedo did not overplay the significance of what his backing meant.
If Bob Brown and his colleagues overplay their hand, they might be punished further down the line.
